prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: DLX-SWIMGOGGLES-PNK-12-35894 Product Type: SAFETY_GLASSES Brand (from catalog): KidPlay Products Existing Title: Kids Swimming Goggles Childrens Swim Mask - Pink Description: There's one thing all kids look forward to when the Summer season comes around - swimming. Whether you're going to the beach, an indoor pool, an outdoor pool, or a water park, you'll want to ensure your child has a trusty pair of swimming goggles to protect their eyes when swimming.

The Kidplokio swimming goggles feature an easy to use, quick-adjust elastic strap that kids can adjust for a perfect fit. This will not only ensure a comfortable fit but provides a snug seal to keep water out of your little one's eyes. The plastic goggles come with a soft silicone frame that won't irritate skin once adjusted properly.

In addition to the goggles, we've included a convenient matching carry case to store the goggles in when not in use. It comes with a lanyard so your child can wear them like a necklace, hang from a backpack or beach bag to keep them handy and organized. The vibrant color will add a fun look to any kid's swimwear. These swimming goggles are a must-have accessory this Summer. Search Terms: kids girl goggles boy neon colored swim swimming childrens toddler plastic swimwear eye-wear hot fuschia case holder pool accessories summer toy bright protection carrying lanyard tie comfortable adjustable string simple safety viz visibility ocean Features: - EASY TO USE QUICK ADJUST STRAP - Kids can easily adjust the elastic strap for a perfect fit, which ensures a comfortable, snug seal to keep water out of eyes while swimming - FUN VIBRANT COLOR - The super-bright neon pink colored goggles add a cool look to any kid's swimwear, and the high-visibility color helps prevent kids from losing their goggles in the pool or at the beach - DESIGNED FOR INDOOR/OUTDOOR SWIMMING - Our goggles are designed to be used in both indoor and outdoor pools, and work great at the beach too! - SAFE MATERIAL FOR KIDS - Goggles are made of plastic with a soft silicone eye-frame to provide comfort while protecting eyes from fresh or salt water - CONVENIENT CARRY CASE - Our goggles come with a matching neon carry case with a lanyard, so kids can wear them around their neck, attach to their backpack or beach bag while not in use! === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: KidPlay Products Kids Swimming Goggles Pink

openai.item_name: KidPlay Products Kids Pink Swimming Goggles

anthropic.title_differentiation: Quick Adjust Strap, Neon Pink High Visibility, Soft Silicone Frame, Includes Carry Case With Lanyard

openai.title_differentiation: Quick Adjust Strap, Soft Silicone Frame, Carry Case With Lanyard, Indoor Outdoor And Beach Use, High Visibility
